events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess whether the work complies. The scenario: classified-area wiring methods, missing seal-off fitting at boundary. Stage: rough-complete. Reference: NEC 500-516. Seal-offs are required at boundaries between classified and non-classified locations per NEC 501.15 (A)(4) etc. Missing it is non-compliant. So decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Missing seal-off in classified area is a serious safety issue, could lead to explosion. So risk: critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: non-compliant (since missing required fitting). Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 80%? But missing seal-off, so probably not fully complete. Estimate 70%? Since missing critical part, maybe less. Confidence: high. Findings: "Missing seal-off fitting at classified area boundary." Actions: "Immediately install approved seal-off fitting before energizing." Rationale: "NEC 501.15 requires seal-offs at boundaries of classified locations to prevent migration of flammable gases." References: ["NEC 501.15(A)(4)"]. Sound source, event_time, rate, order, workable: not relevant. So set to defaults: event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Confidence: 1.0. Value: 0. So output JSON.
